name: datto-rmm-mcp
description: Every Datto RMM API operation, plus a local SQLite fleet store and fleet-wide analytics no other Datto tool has.

datto_rmm_api_key.title: DATTO_RMM_API_KEY
datto_rmm_api_key.description: Datto RMM API key (username in the OAuth password grant). Generate in Setup > Users in the Datto RMM web UI.

datto_rmm_api_secret_key.title: DATTO_RMM_API_SECRET_KEY
datto_rmm_api_secret_key.description: Datto RMM API secret key (password in the OAuth password grant).

datto_rmm_token.title: DATTO_RMM_TOKEN
datto_rmm_token.description: Optional. Optional pre-minted OAuth bearer token (skips the auto-mint).
